description.content: Logon and logoff endpoints for obtaining and invalidating session tokens required for all subsequent API calls.

item.name: SAP BI Tools Log on to BI Platform

request.name: SAP BI Tools Log on to BI Platform

description.content: Authenticates a user against the BI Platform and returns a logon token that must be included in subsequent API requests. Supports Enterprise, LDAP, and Windows AD authentication types.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: SAP BI Tools Log off from BI Platform

request.name: SAP BI Tools Log off from BI Platform

description.content: Invalidates the current logon token and terminates the session. The logon token provided in the header is no longer valid after this call.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Execute CMS queries against the BI Platform repository to search for objects using CMS query language syntax.

item.name: SAP BI Tools Execute a CMS query (GET)

request.name: SAP BI Tools Execute a CMS query (GET)

description.content: Executes a CMS query against the BI Platform repository using the query parameter. CMS queries use a SQL-like syntax to search for objects by type, name, and other properties.

query.description: (Required) The CMS query string (e.g., SELECT * FROM CI_INFOOBJECTS WHERE SI_KIND='Webi')
The number of items per page

Manage BI Inbox items including viewing received reports and scheduled instances.

item.name: SAP BI Tools List BI Inbox items

request.name: SAP BI Tools List BI Inbox items

description.content: Retrieves a list of items in the authenticated user's BI Inbox. The inbox contains reports and documents that have been sent to the user or scheduled instances that have completed.

query.description: The number of items per page

Browse and query the CMS InfoStore repository to access documents, folders, users, groups, and other BI Platform objects.

item.name: SAP BI Tools Get InfoStore root

request.name: SAP BI Tools Get InfoStore root

description.content: Retrieves the root entry of the InfoStore repository. The InfoStore is the central object repository of the BI Platform containing all documents, folders, users, and other managed objects.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: SAP BI Tools Get an InfoStore object by ID

request.name: SAP BI Tools Get an InfoStore object by ID

description.content: Retrieves a specific object from the InfoStore repository by its unique CMS object identifier. Returns the object metadata including name, type, creation date, and parent folder.

item.name: SAP BI Tools List children of an InfoStore object

request.name: SAP BI Tools List children of an InfoStore object

description.content: Retrieves the child objects of a specific InfoStore folder or container object. Supports pagination with page and pageSize query parameters. Commonly used to browse the folder hierarchy.

query.description: The number of items per page

info.name: SAP BI Tools SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform RESTful Web Services

description.content:
REST API for SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform (biprws) for managing documents, users, scheduling reports, and querying the CMS repository. The API provides endpoints for authentication via logon tokens, browsing the InfoStore repository, managing BI Inbox items, scheduling report execution, and performing CMS queries. Supports both JSON and XML response formats. Requires a logon token obtained through the logon endpoint for subsequent API calls.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
